privileged_info_summary: Task involves anonymizing synthetic patient data from DrTuxTest MySQL database. Data includes 12 test patient records with French names and contact information. All data is programmatically seeded in setup_task.sh for testing purposes. The task requires extracting records from IndexNomPrenom and fchpat tables, applying GDPR-compliant anonymization transformations (suppressing names/addresses/phones/SSNs, pseudonymizing with PATIENT_XXX IDs, generalizing birth dates to age bands, generalizing postal codes). Output files must be written to /home/ga/research_export/ directory. Verifier checks for PII leakage by comparing output against original patient data stored in /tmp/task_verification/.
